assertions.title: Homepage to meal plan ordering flow

steps.expected: Homepage loads with hero section and CTA button
steps.observed: Homepage loaded with hero section showing 'Food Made With Intention' headline, body copy, and 'EXPLORE PLANS' CTA button. 50/50 split layout with lifestyle image on right.
Navigated to http://localhost:3000/meal-plans. Meal plans comparison page loaded with sidebar navigation, hero banner with 'START YOUR PLAN' CTA, and 'Compare Meal Plans' section.

steps.action: Click 'EXPLORE PLAN' on Performance Fuel card
steps.observed: Navigated to http://localhost:3000/meal-plans/performance-fuel. Plan detail page loaded with hero image, 'Performance Fuel' title, 'Nourishment by Design' section, subscription/one-time toggle, pricing, and 'START YOUR PLAN' CTA.

steps.action: Click 'START YOUR PLAN' CTA on plan detail page
steps.observed: Navigated to http://localhost:3000/meal-plans/order?plan=performance-fuel&days=3&type=subscription. Order configurator loaded with 7-step progress bar, Step 1 'Choose Your Plan' displayed, Performance Fuel pre-selected with checkmark.

summary: Tested 1 assertion: 1 passed. VAL-CROSS-001 homepage-to-mealplan flow works end-to-end — hero CTA navigates to meal plans, plan card navigates to detail page, and Start Your Plan CTA opens the order configurator at step 1 with correct pre-selections.
